govease.name: GovEase
govease.coverage: ~100+ counties (AL, CO, IN, TX, TN, MS, others)

publicsurplus.name: PublicSurplus
publicsurplus.coverage: Most MN counties, some other states

bid4assets.name: Bid4Assets
bid4assets.coverage: 100+ counties, 30+ states. Dominant in WA (~11 counties) and TX.
bid4assets.notes: Cloudflare-protected but high coverage of our target states

realauction.name: RealAuction
realauction.coverage: 11 states, dominant in FL. Also CO, ID

CO.name: CCTPTA (Colorado County Treasurers)
CO.notes: Lists all county sale dates and links statewide

NM.name: NM Taxation & Revenue — Delinquent Property Tax Auctions
NM.notes: State runs all county tax sales. PDF auction lists.

MN.name: MN DNR Land for Sale
MN.notes: Annual DNR land sales via MNBid. 5.6M acres managed.

MT.name: DNRC Trust Lands Catalog
MT.notes: Searchable catalog of MT state trust lands for sale

TX.name: Texas GLO — State Land for Sale
TX.notes: 13M acres managed. Also veterans land program.

OR.name: Oregon County Land Sale Websites (Master List)
OR.notes: Tillamook County maintains links to 18+ county land sale pages

ID.name: Idaho Dept of Lands — Land for Sale
ID.notes: Endowment trust land sales, cottage sites

WY.name: Wyoming Office of State Lands
WY.notes: Trust land sales and oil/gas lease auctions

WA.name: WA Dept of Revenue — County Directory
WA.notes: Master list of all 39 county treasurer websites. Bid4Assets covers ~11 WA counties.

ME.name: Maine Revenue Services — Unorganized Territory
ME.notes: State manages tax-acquired property for ~400 unorganized townships

TN.name: TN STREAM — Surplus Real Estate
TN.notes: State surplus properties approved by State Building Commission
